title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Cipla - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!
